pericopes.title: Sohchang ho Jerusalem a ahung kile kit
Sohchanna kona hung kile kit mijat @9(Neh. 7: 5-73)@7
Ezra in thepmona aphondoh a taona anei
Jatdanga kona kipui numei jia kineiho leh achateu kikaidoh

chapters.text: Persia lengpa Cyrus kitipa leng chan kal kum khat lhin kumin Pakaiyin Jeremiah kama anaseisa thu chu aguilhun theina dingin, Pakai ma man Persia lengpa Cyrus lungthim atil khouvin, hijeh chun Cyrus lengpan ama lenggam sung pumpia thuphondoh khat abol’in, hiche athuphondoh hi lekhan jong asut thon, hitin ati:
“Persia lengpa Cyrus kitipan hitin aseiye, ‘Pakai van Pathen chun keima hi leiset lenggam jouse eipen, chule Judah gamsung Jerusalem khopia ama dinga houin khat kasah doh na dingin eingansei.

Pakai Pathen mite lah a mi koi koi hijeng jong leu chun Pathenin panpiu hen, hotobang miho chu Judah gamsunga Jerusalem khopia chetou hen lang, Pakai Israel Pathen houin sah phatna a gapang hen, ajeh chu Pakai hi Jerusalem khopia cheng Pathen ahi;

amite ahingdoh tua hing nalai jouse chu hoikom muna khopem jongleh, akhopemna gama miten dangka le sana a akithopiuva, thilkeo le gancha jong apeh diu, Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin sah doh teina dinga deichoma athilto diu kalvala hijatpi chu ahinpeh tha diu ahinalaiye,” ati.

Chutah chun mihem koi hileh alungthima Pathen lhagaovin Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin sahna pang dinga atildoh chan chutoh, Judah phung le Benjamin phunga apu apau lhah a phung upa chengse leh thempuho toh chule Levite chu ache din akipatdoh tauve;

chujongle amaho toh cheng khom akimvel’uva cheng miten jong amaho hi akithopiuvin, dangka a kisem kong le lhengin apanpiuvin, sana jong, thilkeo jong, gancha jong chujongle thih mantam tah tah-in jong apanpiuvin, amahon deichoma athiltou sim louhel’in hijatpi hin akitho piuvin ahi.

Chule Cyrus lengpan jong masanga Nebuchadnez’zar lengpan Jerusalem khopia kona anapoh manga ama pathen lim semthu doi houna insunga akoisa Pakai houin sunga kiladoh khon le lheng jouse jong ahinpo doh tai.

Persia lengpa Cyrus chun hiche thil ho hi thil chinga pangpa Mith’redath khut’a konin ahinpo doh-in, Mith’redath kitipa jong hin athilkeo jat, asum jat asimtoh soh keiyin, Judah gama lengpa chapa Shesh-baz’zar khut’a apedoh tai.
Hichea athilpeh asimdoh peh chengse chu sana a kisem kisilna kong sang khat toh, dangka a kisem kisilna kongma ma sang khatma ahin, gimnamtui lheng som ni alhingin,
sana khon som thum ahin, chule dangka a kisem khon sang ni le ja li toh, som khat ahin, chutengleh adang dang umle le bel, khon sang khat jen toh ahithai;

a bon bonin sana le dangka a kisem umle bel khon jouse chu sang nga le ja li toh, som gup le ko alhinge. Sohchang mite Babylon gama kona Jerusalem geiya ahintol tou chun Shesh-baz’-zar kitipan thilkeo hijatpi hi ahintol than ahi.

Mihem hijatpi hi gamsung mi sohchanga kihenna muna kona hung kinung le kit ho chu ahiuvin, amaho hi Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar kitipan sohchang dia anakai mangsa ahiuve; abonchauvin amaho hi Judah gamsunga Jerusalem khopi lama ahung kileuvin, ama ama khosung cheh a akile kit’uve.
Miho hi Zerub’babel le Jeshua, Nehemi’ah, Serai’ah, Re-elai’ah, Mor’decai, Bitshan, Mispar, Big’vai, Rehum chule Ba’anah lamkai nan ahung kitol’uvin ahi. Israel mite amijat mong mong chu
Parosh chate mihem sang ni le ja khat toh, som sagi le ni ahiuvin ahi.
Shephati’ah chate chu mihem ja thum le som sagi le ni ahiuve.
Arah chate chu ja sagi le som sagi le nga ahiuve.
Pa’hathmo’ab chapa teni Jeshua le Jo’ab chate chu sang nile ja get toh som le ni ahiuvin ahi.
Elam chate chu sang khat le ja ni toh, som nga le li ahiuve.
Zattu chate chu ja ko le som li le nga ahiuve.
Zac’cai chate chu ja sagi le som gup alhinguvin ahi.
Bani chate chu jagup le som li le ni ahiuve.
Be’bai chate chu jagup le som ni le thum ahiuve.
Azgad chate chu sang khat le ja ni toh, som ni le ni alhinguvin ahi.
Adoni’kam chate chu jagup le som gup le gup ahiuve.
Big’vai chate chu sang nile som nga le gup ahiuve.
Adin chate chu ja li le som nga le li ahiuve.
Ater chate chu Hezeki’ah chate chengse ahiuvin, mihem som ko le ko bou ahiuvin ahi.
Be’zai chate chu ja thum le som nile thum ahiuve.
Jorah chate chu ja khat le som le ni ahiuve.
Hashum chate chu ja nile som ni le thum ahiuve.
Gibbar chate chu somko le nga bou ahiuve.
Bethlehem chate chu ja khat le som ni le thum ahiuve.
Neto’phah mite chu som nga le gup ahiuve.
An’athoth mite chu ja khat le som ni le get ahiuve.
Az’maveth chate chu som li le ni ahiuve.
Kir’iathar’im chate chu Chephi’rah le Beer’oth chate ahiuvin, mihem ja sagi le som li le ni alhinguve.
Ramah le Geba chate chu jagup le som ni le khat ahiuve.
Michmas mite chu ja khat le som ni le ni ma ahiuve.
Bethel mite leh Ai mite chu ja ni le som ni le thum ahiuve.
Nebo chate chu som nga le ni ahiuve.
Magbish chate chu ja khat le som nga le gup ahiuve.
Elam kitipa michom khat chate jong chu sang khat le ja ni toh, som nga le li ahiuve.
Harim chate chu ja thum le som ni ahiuve.
Lod chate chu Hadid le Ono chate ahiuvin, mihem ja sagi le som ni le nga ahiuve.
Jericho chate chu ja thum le som li le nga ahiuve.
Sena’ah chate chu sang thum le jagup toh, som thum alhinguvin ahi.
Thempu ho chu ahileh: Jedai’ah chate chu Jeshua insung mite abonchauvin mihem ja ko le som sagi le thum ahiuve.
Immer chate chu sang khat le som nga le ni ahiuve.
Pashhur chate chu sang khat le ja ni toh, som li le sagi alhinguve.
Harim chate chu sang khat le som le sagi ahiuve.
Levite chengse chu Jeshua le Kad’mi-el, chule Hodavi’ah chate chu som sagi le li ahiuve.
Lathem ho chu: Asaph chate ja khat le som ni le giet ahiuve.
Kelkot ngah-a pang mite chate ahiuleh: Shallum chate leh Ater chate, Talman chate, Akkub chate, Hatita chate, chule Sho’bai chate abon chauvin ja khat le som thum le ko alhinguvin ahi.
Houin lhacha pang ho chu: Ziha chate, Hasu’pha chate, Tabba’oth chate,
Keros chate, Si’aha chate, Padon chate,
Leba’nah chate, Hag’abah chate, Akkub chate,
Hagab chate, Shamlai chate, Hanan chate,
Giddel chate, Gahar chate, Re-ai’ah chate,
Rezin chate, Neko’da chate, Gazam chate,
Uzza chate, Pase’ah chate, Besai chate,
Uzza chate, Meu’nim chate, Nephi’sim chate,
Bakkuk chate, Haku’pha chate, Harhur chate,
Bazluth chate, Mehi’da chate, Hersha chate,
Barkos chate, Sis’era chate, Temah chate,
Nezi’ah chate, Hati’pha chate ahiuve.
Solomon lhacha a pang ho chate chu: So’tai chate, Hasso’phereth chate, Peru’da chate,
Ja’alah chate, Darkon chate, Giddel chate,
Shephati’ah chate, Hattil chate, Po’chereth-hezzeba’im chate chule Ami chate ahiuve.
Houin lhacha a pang ho le Solomon sohte alhacha chengse chu ja thum le som ko le ni alhinguvin ahi.

Israel mi hiuvam hilou hiuvam kihetoh hih hen lang, amahon jong apu apau insung lhah a akikhai lhah nau kichenin seithei hih-u jongleh anoiya chengse jong hi Tel-me’lah a hung kon, Tel-har’sha a kona hung, Cherub a kona hung, Addan a kona hung, chule Immer a kona hung ahiuve.
Amaho chu Delai’ah chate, Tobi’ah chate, Neko’da chate ahiuvin, abonin jagup le som nga le ni alhinguve.

Chujongleh thempuho chate ho chu Habai’ah chate leh Hakkoz chate, Barzil’lai chate ahiuvin, ajipan Gilead mi Barzil’lai chanu ho khat akichenpi jeh a chate ho hi amin hiche Barzil’laiya kona hi Barzil’lai kisah soh ahiuve.
Mi hijat hin phung gui thusim kijihna a chun aminu akihol’uvin, ahinla aminu akimudoh jou pouve; hijeh chun amaho hi aboh-in akikoiyin thempuho lah a konin akiladoh tauve.
Gamvaipoa pang pan jong thilto theng chungnung chu aneh thei louna diuvin ajah uva aseipeh tai, thempu khat’in Urim le Thummim aman a phun asan masanga aneh thei lou diuva ahil ahitan ahi.
Houbung pumpi chu abonchauvin mihem sang som li le sang ni toh, ja thum le som gup alhingin ahi;
hiche hi asohteu pasal numei kisimthalou ahin, asohteu chu sang sagi le ja thum toh, som thum le sagi ahiuve; alah-uva hin lathem cheh pasal le numei ja ni aumin ahi.
Asakol jouseu jong ja sagi le som thum le gup ahin, asakolpol chengseu jong ja ni le som li le nga alhinge;
asangongsao chengseu jong ja li le som thum le nga alhingin, asanganteu jong sang gup le ja sagi toh chule som ni alhingin ahi.
Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin ahung lhun phat’uvin phung sunga upa phabep’in jong Pathen houin chu akisahna mun ma maa sah doh kit teina din deichoma thanop’a thilto abol’uvin ahi.

Amaho hin atojou kham cheh-in natohna din thil kholna insunga atoh doh-uvin ahileh sana daric sang som gup le sang khat toh, dangka mina sang nga alhingin, thempuho kivonna ding ponsil ja khat toh ahi.

Thempuho leh Leviho, chule mipi phabep jong Jerusalem khopi sung dunga achenguvin ahi. Lathem ho leh kelkotngah a pang ho, houin lhacha ho vang chu ama ama khosung cheh a achenguvin, chuleh Israel mipumpi jong akho khouva akichen soh keiyuvin ahi.
Lha sagi ahung lhin phat’in Israel chate chu khopi dung jousea akikhomsoh keiyuvin, chule mipi chu Jerusalem khopia ahung kikhom’uvin mihem khatseh bangin akilompel jenguve.

Hichun Jo’zadak chapa Jeshua akipatdoh paiyin ahileh athemput khompihon jong ajuiyun, She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel le ainkoten jong ajuiyuvin, amaho hin Pathen mipa Mose danthu lekhabua kisun dungjuiyin pumgo thilto todohna dingin Pathen maicham asemdoh tauve.

Chujongleh maicham chu akitunna ngaiya atunguvin, agamsung mite agin jeh-uvin hiche Pakai maicham chunga hin pumgo thilto atoh-uvin ahi, hiti hin jingkah seh le nilhah seh-in pumgo thilto jeng atoh toh jenguvin ahi.

Lhambuh kut jong abol’uvin, akibol ding dol kisun dungjuiyin abol’uvin, niseh a kibol ding ajat kiseipeh bang bangin, adanthu kisema kitepna bangin niseh leh pumgo thilto ding dol chu atoh jing jenguve.

Hiche ban a jong hin tantih neilouva kibol pumgo thilto leh lhathah jousea kibol thilto ding jat ahin, Pakai dinga aphat tepsa kibol jing thilto ho jong ahin, chutengleh mihem koi hijeng jongleh acham chama deichoma Pakaiya toh ho thilto jong ahithai.
Lha sagi lhinna nikho masapen nia pat’in amahon Pakai dingin pumgo thilto atoh pan’uvin ahi. Ahin hiche gei jong hin Pakai houin mun akigong hih laiye.

Hiti hin amahon Persia lengpa Cyrus koma kona sum amujat dungjuiy uvin thing vaibol ho leh thing thembol ho chu sum apeuvin, an neh dingle lengpitwi don ding jong apeuvin, thaotwi gei geiyin hiche Sidon miho leh Tyre miho chu apeuvin, Lebanon lhanga kona Cedar thing ho ahintol’uva twikhanglen gei, Joppa geiya ahintolna diuvin apeuvin ahi.

She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel le Jo’zadak chapa Jeshuan asopite lhon adang ho toh, thempuho le Leviho pum, sohchanna kona Jerusalem khopia ahung kitollut piu mipi chutoh natoh akipatnau chu Jerusalem khopia Pathen houina ahung kitol lut kal’u kum ni lhin kum, lha ni lhinna ahitai. Pakai houin sah phatna natoh vetup’a pang din mihon Levite chu kum som nia lhah chung lamse se apansah-uvin ahi.

Hitobang hin Jeshua le achapate jong asopite jong, Kad’mi-el le achapate jong, Judah chapate pum pumin Pathen houin kisah phatna natoh vetup chun apang cheh uvin, Hen’adad chapate leh Levite toh chule amaho chapate jong a-inkoteu jong apang soh keiyui.

Houina saa pang mihon houin mun ding alaiyuva Pakai houin mun ding aset pat phat’uvin, masanga Israel lengpa David’in anahil nau bang bangin Pakai thangvah din thempuhon avon akivon cheh-uvin sumkon akichoiyun masang lama ahunguvin, Levi ho jong ahungun, Asaph chapate jong ahunguvin khutbeh ahin kichoisoh keiyun ahi;

@@amaho hi akilang lhah uvin Pakaiya vahchoina le thangvahna abol’uve: @1“Pakai chu anun nemin, @1Alungset longlouvin tonsot geiyin @3Israel din athoh jouve,” atiuve. @0Hitia hi Pakai avahchoi tenguleh mipin ogin sang tah tah-in asam jiuvin ahi, ipijeh-inem itileh Pakai houin inmun chu kisedoh-ah ahitai.

Hichea vang hin thempuho lah a mi tampi leh Leviho lah a mi tamtah jong, chule insung lhah dungjuiya phung upa chengsen jong, tehse ho jeng jong chun houin mun kisetdoh jeng chu amu’uva ahileh, hitobang tah a houin mun kiset amutah phat’u hin ogin sang tah-in apenguvin akapjah jenguvin ahi mipi tamtah kipah a a-aosot sot nah vangin amaho vang hi akap tauve.

Hichea hin mipin kipah a aosot sot’a peng ogin chuleh mipi ka-gin chu hoijoh chu hoiche ham, tin adat khen thei tapouve; ipijeh-inem itileh mipi chu othongje jua pengjah jah jeng ahitauvin, gamla tah a kona jong kijasoh hel’ah ahitan ahi.
Judah le Benjamin dinga melmaten sohchannaa kona hung kik kit mihon Pakai Israel Pathen dingin houin khat asapan tauve, ti ajah doh phat’uvin,

amahon Zerub’babel leh apu apau lhah a insunga phung upa chengse ahin nailut jenguvin amaho jah a chun aseitauve, “Keiho jong nangho toh pang khomin hiche houin sakhom cheh naute; ijehinem itileh keihon jong nangho bol bang banga nangho Pathen hi kahou uva, Assyria lengpa E’sar-had’don kitipan hikom muna eihin pui lut niuva pat’a hiche Pathen henga hi keiho kithoiya kilhai jing jeng kahiuve,” atiuvin ahiye.

Ahivangin Zerub’babel le Jeshua ahin, Israel sunga apu apau insung kailhah a upa chengsen jong amaho jah a aseiyun. “Keihon ka-Pathen u houin dinga hiche in khat kasahnau chung changa hin nangho nakisah lelna diu imacha a um poi; keihon kachangseh-uva kasah-uva, Pakai Israel Pathen houin kasah diu ahin, Persia leng, Cyrus lengpan keiho thu eipeh bang banguva keihon kasah-uleh ahijenge,” atiuve.
Chutah chun agamsung miten Judah mite chu athaset sah gam tauvin, hiche houin asahna ding chung changuva hin akichat tijatsah gamtauve;

chujongleh mi thumop them tah tah, Judahte lung ngaito su-lha dingin athalah jenguvin Persia lengpa Cyrus hinlaisen hitobang hin abol’uvin, Persia lengpa ma ma Darius lengvaipoh chan geiyin jong hitobang hin anabol jing nalaiyui.
Ahasu-e’rus kitipan lengvai ahinpoh phat’in, ama lengvaipoh kipat til lam hin amahon Judah gamsung le Jerusalem khopia chengte dounan lekha asep’uvin ahi.

Chujouvin jong Ar-taxerx’es kitipa vaihom laiyin Bishlam le Mith’redath toh, Ta’be-el le amaho kiloipi chengsen hiche Persia lengpa Ar-taxerx’es kitipa henga hin lekha asep kit’uvin ahi; hiche lekha aseu hi Aramaic lekhajem kimanga Aramaic paova kisun ahi.
Sepai lamkaipa Rehum le danthu lekha thempa Shim’shai jong chun Jerusalem khopi dounan Artaxerx’es lengpa henga anoiya kisei bang hin lekha anasep’uvin ahi.

Hiti tah hin sepai lamkaipa Rehum le danthu lekha thempa Shim’shai ahin, aloi agol dang dang lhon toh, thutan vaihom ho ahiuvin, gamvaipoa pang ho ahiuvin, vaibola pang ho leh Persia mite, Erech mite, Babylon mite, Elam mi Susa kiti ho jong ahiuvin,

mi minthang tah le ginle ja umtah Osnap’par kitipan ahin toldoh a Samaria gamsung khopi dunga achensah namtin vaipi lah a mi adang dang jong ahiuvin, vadung gal langa gamkai amoh chengsea jong cheng ahiuvin, amaho hin
lekha anaseu chu hitobang banga hi kisun ahin, akijih doh son chu hiche hi ahiye: “Ar-taxerx’es lengpa henga: luipi gal lama cheng nasohte keihon pachatna thu kahin thot’uve.

Nangma koma kona hung kitoldoh Judah mite chu keiho henga ahunguvin chuin Jerusalem khopia achetauve, ti lengpan hetan nate. Tulai hin amahon hiche gamvaipote dou jinga pang khopi gilou tah chu asaphauvin ahiye; apal jouse vang asajou tauvin, in-mun asemphat laitah-u ahi.

Lengpan phatechan hethemin, hiche khopi hi hung kisapha hen lang apal jouse kigensoh leh, akho mite hin kai ahindon lou diu ahin, thil lahman kai kipea jong apeh dauva, leiset man kai kidongjong apeh da diu, lengpan angaiya lhosoh man kai adon jong pepou vinte, chutengleh kai kidong hi hung lhasama mahthah jeng ding ahitai.

Keiho hi lengpa inpi sunga an-nat leh a kivah kahijeh-uvin hitobanga lengpa nahsahmona thil kibol hettohsah a pang lou thei kahipouvin, hichejeh a chu keihon hiche thu hi kahin thot’uva lengpa henga kahin hetsah-u ahi,

chutileh nangman napu napate thuchinna lekhabu jouse naphoh a navet toh thei ding, chutengleh nangman hiche thusim lekhabu dunga hiche khopi Jerusalem hi gamvaipote dou jinga, lengte ding leh gamsunga kivaipohna dinga jong kisuh khahna tah ahin, masang laiya pat’a hiche khopi sunga kona hi lengte douna ding hung kipandoh jing jeng ahi, ti namudoh ding ahi. Hichejeh a chu hiche khopi hi acheng beiya thip hel’a anaum-ah ahiye.
Keihon lengpa henga kahetsah-u ahiye, hiche khopi hi kisapha hen lang apal jouse kijousoh keileh, nangman vadung gal lamse sea chu chenmun nanei thei louhel ding ahitai,” atiuve.

Lengpan adonbut ding khat athot’in: “Sepai lamkaipa Rehum le danthu lekha thempa Shim’shai toh, chule amani panpi aloi agolte lhon, Samaria khopia cheng jouse leh vadung gal lam gamkai sunga cheng ho jouse henga din pachatna kahin thot’e.
Nang hon kahenguva nahin thot’u lekha thot chu akiledoh soh keiyin, chujouvin keima angsunga kichentah-in akisimdoh tai.

Chujongleh thupeh akineiyin, kholtohna aumtan, hichea hin hiche Jerusalem khopi hi masang laiya pat’a leng jouse douva pangjing jenga, akho sunga hi gamvaipote douna kibol jing ahinai, tin akimudoh tai.

Chujongleh leng thahat tah tah ho jong Jerusalem khopi sunga lengvaipon anapang uvin, amaho hin vadung gal gamsung jouse jong vai anahom thauve, hiche leng ho hi mihon thil kilahman kai jong anapeuvin, leiset man kai jong anapeuve.
Hichejeh a chu nang hon tua hi thu napeh-uva hiche mite hin anatoh-u angah diu, keiman thu kapeh kit masangsea hiche khopi hi kisathah thei louhel ding ahi.
Hiche thudol a hi thaset nabol’uva nalhah dah louhel diu ahi; achuti louva ahileh lengpa dinga thilse kiboldoh be cheh thei ding ahi,” atipeh-e.

Ar-taxerx’es lengpa lekha thot chu Rehum le danthu lekha thempa Shim’shai toh, amani loi le golte dang dang angsunga asimdoh peh phat’uvin, amaho jong man gang tah-in pumhat chang leh thahat sanin Jerusalem khopia Judah mite henga alhaijel jenguvin, amaho natoh chu aga ngah sah tauve.
Chuphat’in Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin kisah chu atang tai; anatoh mong chu Persia lengpa Darius lengvaipoh jou kal kum ni lhin geiyin atangdel jengin ahi.
Themgao teni Haggai le Iddo chapa Zechari’ah chun Judah gamsung le Jerusalem a cheng Judah mite henga achunguva thunei vaihoma pang Israel Pathen minin gaothu aseilhonin ahi.

Chuphat’in She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel leh Jo’zadak chapa Jeshua chu akipat lhonin Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin chu sah phat din ago-lhon tai. Amaho hi Pathen themgao teni jong chun apanpiuvin, akithopiuve.

Hichepet hin vadung gal lama gam-vaipoa pang Tat’tenai leh She’thar-boz’enai chu aloi agolteu toh ahenguva ahunguvin ajah uva hitin aseitauve, “Hiche houin sahna ding hi koipenin thu napeh uva, chule houin hitobanga kigong hi sah jou teina dinga kon naseipeh uham?” atiuvin ahi.
“Hichea hi houin hiche tobang nasah dohna diuva athubol avaihoma pang miho chu koi koi hiuvam?” tin jong adonguve.

Ahivangin a-Pathenuvin Judah mite upaho chu avet tup jing jeng ahijeh-in athilsoh umchan hi Darius lengpa henga akiseipeh a chutengleh aman athu umchan ding dol ahinle kit masangsen, amaho hiche houin kisah natoh chu asutang thei tapouve.
Vadung gal lama gamvaipoa pang Tat’tenai le She’thar-boz’enai toh, chule vadung gal langa gamvaipoa pang ho aloi agolteuvin Darius lengpa anathot’u lekha thot kijih doh chu hiti hi ahi:
amahon Darius lengpa chu athu umchan dol agah thot’uvin, hiche lekha a chun hi tin akisune; “Darium lengpa henga, ijakaiya cham leng hen.

Keiho Judah gamsunga kacheuva, Pathen loupi tah houina kalut’u hi lengpan ana hetei tei hen. Hiche houin hi songtum len tah tah a kisa ahin, ainthil thing ho jeng hi apal dunga din akigen pan tan ahi; hiche anatoh-u hi amaho hapanjal’in ma neitah in achal jingin, chule atong ho khut’a hin akhang tou jing theiye.

Hichea hin keihon jong upaho chu kadonguvin ajah uva hitin kaseiyuve. “Hiche houin sahna ding hi koipenin thu napeh uva. chule houin hitobanga kigong hi sah jou teina dinga kon naseipeh uham?” tin jong kadonguvin ahi.
Chutengleh amaho lah alamkaiya pang ho jong nangma het din kadeiyun hijeh chun amin jouseu kadongun jihdoh cheh din kagouve.

Chule amahon eidonbut nau chu hiche hi ahi: ‘Keihohi van le lei Pathen lhacha kahiuvin, masang laiya kum tamtah masanga Israel leng loupi tah khat’in anasah a ajosa chu keihon kasemphat uva hiche houin hi kathahsah kit’u ahi.

Kapu kapateuvin van Pathen chu aphin lung hang jeh-uva Pathenin amaho chu Chaldea mi Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar khut’a anapeh doh a, aman jong hiche Israel insung mite hi asuhmanga amite jeng jong Babylon gam langa anapoh mang ahitai.
Ahivangin Babylon lengpa ma ma Cyrus leng chan kat kum khat lhin kumin, hiche Cyrus lengpa hin hiche Pathen houin hi sah phat kit ding tin thu alhuhsah tai.

Chutengleh Pathen houin sunga kikhol sana le dangka khon le bel jouse Nebuchadnez’zar kitipan Jerusalem khopi sunga houin sunga kona anapoh doh a Babylon gamsunga milim houin sunga apoh lut chengse jong chu hiche Cyrus kiti lengpa hin Babylon gamsung milim kihouna houin sunga konin apodoh soh keiyin, abonin aman gamvaipoa asempa Shesh-baz’zar kitipa henga apedoh soh keitai.

Hichun Cyrus hin amapa jah a aseipeh-in, “Hiche khon ho le lheng ho hi kipoh-in chen, abonchan Jerusalem khopia houin sunga gakoi kit tan, chujongleh Pathen houin chu akisahna ngai amun ma maa gasa kit’in.” anati.

Chuphat’in Shesh-baz’zar kitipa hi ahungin Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin chu ain-mun ahung sep tan ahi; hichea pat’ a chu tuni geiya ahouin hi kisa sa jeng ahin, akisa jou hih laiye.’ tin eidonbut’uvin ahi.

Hichejeh chun lengpan naphatsah a ahileh Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin sah phat ding hi Cyrus lengpan thu apeh mong hiya, hilou ham kholtohna dingin Babylon gamsunga lengte thusim kisutna lekhabu jouse kholsah temin. Chujou teng-leh lengpan nangma lungdei deiyin keiho henga hiche chung chang thudola neihin thot tauvin.” atiuve.
Chuphat’in lengpa Darius jong chun thu apen Babylon gamsunga lengte thusim kisutna lekha jouse kikholna insung chu mi akholsah tai.
Hichea hin Media gamkaiya Ecbat’ana kiti gamkai dinga khopipen khat ahin lekhajol khat akimudoh-in, hichea hin hiche anoiya kiseiho hi akisune; “Thuchinna lekhabu,

Cyrus lengpa leng chan kal kum khat lhin kumin hiche Cyrus kiti lengpa hin thupeh khat anasemin: Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin chung chang thudola hin, kilhaina gantha kibolna leh pumgo thilto kitona ji houin chu kithahsah kit hen; ainsan dol chu tong somgup hihen lang, availam jong tong somgup ma hihen,
songtum lentah tah gol thumin kigol hen lang chule thingtum jong gol khat’in kigol hen; chutengleh hiche song ho hileh inthil ho hi lengte kholsa suma kona peh ding ahi.

Chujongleh Jerusalem khopia Pathen houin muntheng phunga chu thil ijakai nung poh lut kit’a koilutsoh keina dinga, masang laiya Nebuchadnez’zar in Jerusalem a kona Babylon langa anapoh mangsa Pathen houin sunga sana le dangka khon le lheng jouse jong chu nung poh lut cheh ding ahi.
“Hichejeh hin vadung gal lam gamkaiya gamvaipoa pang Tat’tenai kitipa leh She’thar-boz’enai toh chule nang ni toh natoh kibanga vadung gal lam ma maa gamvaipoa pang miho chu kikhindal jenguvin;
hichea Pathen houin kisah hi don da jenguvin; Judah mite dinga gamvaipoa pang pa leh Judah mite upa chengsen hiche Pathen houin hi amunlui ma a chun kisah thim thimu hen.

Hiche kalval jong hin keiman thupeh khat kasemdoh tai, hiche hi nang hon hichea Pathen houin kisahna chung changa nanghon Judah te upa chengse nabolna diu thudol ahi; houin athahsah nau sum alut jat hi nang hon ki-nomsot louhel’a lengte suma kona jong hiche upa ho hi napeh uva chule vadung gal lam gamkaiya kai kidonga jong napeh peh jeng diu ahibouve.

Chutengleh ipi pi hijongleh apanlouva khoh jouse chu bongchal gol ho hihen lang, kelngoichalte hijongleh, kelngoite hihen ipi pi hijongleh hiche van Pathen henga pumgo thiltoa peh ding dol chu suhlou chang hihen lang chi hijongleh, lengpitwi hihen lang thaotwi hijeng jongleh, Jerusalem khopia thempuhon akhoh dungjuiya adeijat jat chu thon louhel’a nisim niseh a amaho chu peh peh jeng ding ahi;
chutileh thempuho hin van Pathen henga chu ama lung lhai theina dinga kilhaina abol’uva, lengpa damtheina dingleh achate phattheina dia ataopeh thei diu ahi.

Chujongleh keiman hiche thupeh khat jong kasemdoh-in, hichea hi mihem khattouvin hiche kigahna thupeh hi apal keh a ahileh, hitobang mipa chu alhungpi kibotdoh jeng ding, ain neipa chu alhungpi chunga kikanbeh a kikhailih ding, ain jong chu eh-in a kisemdoh ding ahi.

Jerusalem khopia ahouin kisa Pathen chun koi leng hihen lang mi koi jat hijongleh hiche houin kisathah hi kheldoh ding goa ham ahilouleh suhset ding ngaitoa ham chu, hiche khopi sunga amin chensah jing Pathen chun abung bun tung jeng hen; Darius kitipa keiman hiche thupeh kigahna hi kasemdoh ahi, min lung geltah-in molso cheh hen,” tin akisune, tin alethot tai.

Darius lengpan thu ahin nung thot bang bangin vadung gal lama gamvaipoa pang Tat’tenai le She’thar-boz’enai toh chule aloi agolte lhon chun alung gel kham khamin lung geltah-in Darius lengpa thupeh bang bangin aboltauve.

Chujongleh Haggai themgaopa leh Iddo chapa Zechari’ah gao thuseiya konin Judah mite upaho jong ahouin sah-u achal cheh cheh jengin akhangtou tul tul jenge. Israel Pathen thusah a kona Persia leng Cyrus le Darius chule Ar-taxerx’es thupeh a konin Israelten jong ahouin sah-u chu ajoutauvin ahi;
hiche houin kithah-sah kit chu Darius lengpa lengvaipoh kal kumgup lhin kuma Adar lha, nithum lhin nin akisajou soh tai.
Sohchanna kona hung kinung le kit Israel chate leh thempuho jong, Levite leh midang dangjong chu akipah thanomsoh keiyun, hiche Pathen houin chu thensona kut abol tauve.

Hiche Pathen houin thensona ding hin amahon bongchal ja khat le kelngoichal ja ni toh, kelngoi ja li jen atoh doh jenguvin, chujongleh Israel pumpi din chonset thiltoa man din kelchal som le ni atoh doh-uvin, hiche kelchal som le ni hi Israel phung som le ni dungjuiya kibol ahi.
Mihon thempuho chu aloi loiya akihop khen banguvin ahom khen’un, chule Levite jong chu agol gol’in apansah uvin, Mose lekhabua kisun dungjuiyin Jerusalem khopia Pathen kinbolna na atonguve.
Lha masapen nisom le ni li lhin nin sohchang hung kile kit mihon kalchuh kut amanguvin ahi.

Thempu holeh Levite jong chu abonchauva amaho le amaho kithenso cheh ahitauvin, abonchauva athenga angimsoh ahitauve. Hitobanga kithensosa miho hin sohchang hung kile kit ho ding leh athemput chanpi mihou ding chule amaho neh dingin jong kalchuh kut kelngoi ho chu athat’uvin ahi;

hiche kalchuh kut an hi sohchang hung kile kit Israel chate jousen aneuvin, chutengleh Pakai Israel Pathen houna dinga ama le ama acham chama kikhindoh a agamsung mite thilbol aboh chengsea kona kikangsea amaho hinjop chengse jong chun aneuvin ahi.

Hiti hin Israelten ni sagi sungin cholsolou changlhah kut kipah thanom tah-in amanguvin ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin amaho hi kipah thanoma alha a, chujongleh amaho Assyria lengpa lungthima lungsetna apeh a, hijeh a chu Assyria lengpan jong amaho akithopia, Israel Pathen, hiche Pathen houin sahnaa hi apanhu’u ahiye.
Thilsoh hijatpi nung hin Persia lengpa Ar-taxerx’es kitipa lengvaipoh laiyin Serai’ah kitipa chapa Ezra chu apa Serai’ah ahin, Seraiah pa Hilki’ah ahin,
Hilki’ah chu Shallum chapa ahin, Shallum chu Zadok chapa ahin, Zadok chu Ahi’tub chapa ahin,
Ahi’tub chu Amari’ah chapa ahin, Amari’ah chu Azari’ah chapa ahin, Azari’ah chu Merai’oth chapa ahin,
Merai’oth chu Zerahi’ah chapa ahin, Zerahi’ah chu Uzzi chapa ahin, Uzzi chu Bukki chapa ahin.
Bukki chu Abi’shua chapa ahin, Abi’shua chu Phin’ehas chapa ahin, Phin’ehas chu Elea’zar chapa ahin, chule Elea’zar chu thempu chungnung Aaron chapa a hi;

hiche Ezra kitipa hi Babylon gama kona hungtou ahin, ama hi masang laiya Pakai Israel Pathenin Mose anapehsa danthu chu kihila them-ah ahitai: ama hi Pakai a-Pathenin akithopia akaile jeh-in ipi hijong leh aman angeh chan chu lengpan aphalpeh peh jenge.

Ar-taxerx’es lengpa leng chan kal kum sagi lhin kumin Israel chate phabep le thempuho mi phabep jong, Leviho jong, lathem ho leh kelkot ngah-a pang miho jong, chule houin lhachaa pang ho jong Jerusalem khopia ahung kitoltou chehuvin ahi.
Ezra chu Persia lengpa leng chan kal kum sagi lhin kum lha nga lhin nan Jerusalem khopi ahung lhung tan ahi;

ajeh chu kum sunga lha masapen nikho masa nia Babylon gama kona hung kipatdoh a hung tou pan ahitan, a Pathen thahat nan phatah a akhut’a kaile jeh-in lha nga lhin na nikho masapen nin Jerusalem khopi ahung lhung tai.

ijehinem itileh Ezra hin Pakai danthu chu phatah a asima kihilna aneiya, natoh a poh doh ding agot’a, chujongleh Pakai chondan thu jouse leh achonna dan jouse chu Israelte lah a hil le ding agot jong ahi.
Israelte dinga Pakai thupeh jouse leh chondan jouse kihil themsa, danthu lekha thempa, thempu Ezra kitipa khut’a Ar-taxerx’es lengpan anapeh lekha kisun chu akijih doh kit’ in hiche hi ahi:
“Leng jouse lengpa Ar-taxerx’es kitipan van Pathen danthu lekha thempa Ezra henga din kahinseiye.

Keiman thupeh khat kasemin, Israel chate koi hijongleh, thempuho hihen lang Levite hijongleu keima lenggam sung a cheng jouse chu achamtah a Jerusalem khopi langa chenom aum’uva ahileh nangtoh kilhonin chethei cheh uvinte.

Ijeh-inem itileh nangma hi lengpan ama thumop’a pang jing pasal sagi toh nasol tha ahin, nangman khut’a nachoi jing na-Pathen danthu dungjuiya Judah gam umchan leh Jerusalem khopi um dol kholtoh dinga nasol ahi;
chujongleh Jerusalem khopia chenna mun ain kisong Israel Pathen henga dia lengpa le lengpa thumop’a pang mihon acham cham’uva atodoh jengu dangka le sana thah lut dinga jong nasol ahi:

hiche dangka le sana hi Babylon gamsunga nadondoh sau dangka le sana toh napoh thauva, Jerusalem khopia a-Pathenu houin sahna dinga mipin kiphal tah a atodohu leh thempuhon atou, thanom tah a kitepna neiya ato chengseu chutoh napoh tha diu ahi.

Hiche sum a hi nangman chingthei tah a nabola bongchal ho hihen lang kelngoichal te hijongleh, kelngoite hihen lang chule lhosoh thiltoa to ding hijongleh, lengpitwi donthei thilto ding pum puma nachoh a aboncha chu Jerusalem khopia na-Pathenu houin sunga maicham phunga natodoh soh kei diu ahi.
Dangka le sana avaldoh amoh chengse chu nang le nasopite gel dol’a iloa pha nasah-uvam, na-Pathen u lungdei deiya namanchah theiyu ahitai.
Nangma nakipe hiche khonho le lheng ho hi naPathen houin sunga manchah dinga nakipe-ah ahin, aboncha hi Jerusalem Pathen angsunga nalhut tei tei ding ahi.
NaPathen houin natohna ding manchah ding ipi hijongleh aphat dungjuiya man louva khoh jouse chu nangman lengpa neile gouva kona nalah a napeh thei ahiye.

“Chujongleh Ar-taxerx’es lengpa keiman luipi gal lama gamkai sunga thil chinga kipansah ho jouse henga din thupeh khat kasemin, ‘ipi hijongleh van Pathen danthu lekha them, thempupa Ezra in nahenguva athum chan chu ching thei tah a lung gel’a nabolpeh tei tei diu ahi,

dangka talent ja khat gei hihen lang, suhlou chang ate-na ja khat gei hijongleh, lengpitwi ate-na ja khat gei hileh, thaotwi jong ate-na ja khat gei hijeng jongleh chi jeng jong ijat mong ti umdeh louhel’a napeh diu ahi.

Ipi pi hijeng jong leh van Pathenin thu apeh chan chu Van Pathen houin sahna dinga lhingset’a peh doh ding ahiye. chutilouva ahileh lengpa gamsung le achapate chunga Pathen lungsatna hung lhungjeng ding ahi.

Chujongleh keihon nahenguva kahetsah nahiuve: thempuho le Levi ho, lathem ho, kelkot ngah a pang ho, houin lhacha a pang ho, chule Pathen houin hikoma lhacha pang midang dang ho jong hi nang hon kai jong nadon lou diu, thil lahman kai jong nalah lou diu, leiset man kai jong napohsah thei louhel diu ahi, dan ngai ahipoi.

“Ezra nangman jong natha neina Pathenin chihna napeh dungjuiyin vaipoa pang ding leh thutan vaihom ding mi lhengdoh-in lang, amaho hin luipi gal lama mite jouse chunga thu atan’uva vai ahom diu ahi; amaho hi nangma Pathen danthu hethem mijeng hi diu ahiye; ijemtia danthu chu ahelou aum khah a ahijongleh nangman nahil thu thu ding ahi.

Mihem koi hijeng jongleh na-Pathen danthu ngailou leh lengpa danthu ngailou chu, hitohang mihem chunga hi gihsa tah a thu kitan ding, tha ding ham, tolmang ding ham ahilouleh athilkeo jouse lahpeh ding ham, songkul ham khat a khum ding ham khat’a kibol tei tei ding ahiye,” ati.
Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin jep hoina dinga lengpa lungthim sunga hitobang lunggel hinkhumpeh a Pakai ipu ipateu Pathen chu∑nun nom hen;

hiche Pakai Pathen hin lengpa le lengpa thumop’a pang miho angsung le lengpa dinga mihat vaibola pang ho angsunga keima hi long louhel ‘in eilungset’ in ahi. Pakai ka-Pathen thahatna kachunga aumjehin keiman jong hang tah-in na katongin, keitoh kilhona chetou din Israelte lah a konin lamkai chengse kakou khomsoh keiye.
Ar-taxerx’es lengpa lengvaipoh laiya Babylon gama kona keitoh hung kilhontou Israelte apu apauva phung sunga insung upa chengse chu akhangguiyu hitia hi kisim ahiuve:
Phinehas chate lah a Gershom ahin, Ith’amar chate lah a Daniel ahi; David chate lah a Hattush ahin,
ama hi Shecani’ah chapa ahi. Parosh chate lah a chun Zechari’ah ahin, Zechari’ah toh kisimtha chu mihem ja khat le som nga alhinguvin ahi.
Pa’hath-mo’ab chate lah a konin Zerahi’ah chapa El’ie-ho-e’nai ahin, ama hitoh mihem ja ni akisimthai.
Zattu chate lah konin jong Jahazi’el chapa Shecani’ah ahin, ama toh mihem ja thum alhinguve.
Adin chate lah a Jonathan chapa Ebed ahin, ama hitoh mihem som nga ahiuve.
Elam chate lah a Athali’ah chapa Jeshai’ah ahin, ama to hin mihem som sagi ahiuvin ahi.
Shephati’ah chate lah a Michael chapa Zebadi’ah ahin, ama hitoh mihem som get ahiuve.
Jo’ab chate lah a Jehi’el chapa Obadi’ah ahin, ama hitoh mihem ja nile som le get alhinguvin ahi.
Bani chate lah a Josiphi’ah chapa Shelo’mith ahin, ama pum hin mihem ja khat le somgup ahiuve.
Be’bai chate lah a Bebai chapa Zechari’ah ahin, ama pumin mihem som ni le get alhinguve.
Azgad chate lah a Hak’katan chapa Joha’nan ahin, ama pumin mihem ja khat le som khat ahiuve.
Adoni’kam chate lah a chun khonunga hung ho chu ahiuvin, amin u jong Eliph’elet, Jeu’el, chule Shemai’ah ahiuvin, amaho pum hin mihem som gup jen ahiuve.
Big’vai chate lah a Uthai le Zaccur toh, chule amani pum hin mihem som sagi jong ahiuve.

Ken amaho hi Aha’va langa long vadunga chun kakou khomsoh keiyin, hikoma chun nithum sungin ngahmuna kapansauve. Hichea hin mipi lah le thempuho lah chu avel’in kakholtoh kit’in ahileh Levi chapate khat’a khat jeng cha jong kamudoh poi.

Hichun keiman Elie’zer le Ar’i-el toh, Shemai’ah, Elna’than, Jarib, Elna’than, Nathan, Zechari’ah, chule Meshul’lam lamkai lung gel them cheh mi hijat hi kasol’in, ajeh chu Joi’arib le Elna’than hi lung khomto gelmi ahilhonin;

abonchau hin Casiphia gamkaiya lamkai nasa tah Iddo kitipa henga kasoltai. Amaho hin Iddo le asopi Casiphia khopia houin lhachaa pang ho jah a asei diu jong kahil’in, keiho dinga ka-Pathenu houina lhacha a panga kinbol ding mi eihinsol pehna diuvin kaseiye.

Ka-Pathenu thahat chu keiho chunga aum jing jeh-in amaho hin pasal thil hethem tah mi khat, Mahli chapate lah a Levi chapa, Israel chapa, amin Sherebi’ah kitipa chu achapate leh asopite pumin mihem som le get jen toh eihin pui peh uvin ahi;
chujongle Hashabi’ah jong ahin, ama hi Merar’i chapate toh ahiuvin, ainkoteu leh achapate pumin mihem som ni jong ahithauve;

hijat hi David le avaibola pang mihon Levite kithopia panga houin lhachaa pang dinga atumbeh a alhendoh sau mihem ja ni le som ni chunga chu kibe kit ahi. Mihem hijat hi amin cheh a kijih lut’a kisundoh cheh ahiuve.

Aha’va vadunga chun keiman an ngol ding kasomin, hitia chu keihon kaPathen angsunga ki-ngaitomna kanei theiyuva, keiho jong kachateu jong chule kathilkeo jouseu jong phatecha kajotnau kalhun kimsoh theina diuvin Pathen henga tao theina din kabol’uve.

Ijeh-inem itileh hitobanga kholgam a kache nauva hi melmatea kona eihongdoh diuva lengpa henga sepai phabep le sakol touthem mi phabep thum ding chu keiman jachatnan kagel tai; ajeh chu keihon lengpa jah a chu, “Keiho Pathen chu ama holte dinga phatah a thahat neiya ahin, ama sumilte jouse dinga alungsatna tha kisong jing jeng ahi,” tia kaseisau ahitai.
Hijeh chun keihon an ka-ngol’uvin kakholjinna chung chang thudol chun ka-Pathenu henga kataovuva ahileh, amanjong keiho taona angaitai.
Hichun ken jong lamkai thei cheh thempu som le ni kalhengdoh tai, amaho chu: Sherebi’ah, Hashabi’ah, chule asopite lhon midang som khat toh ahiuve.

Hiche thempuho khut’a hin dangka le sana khan le lheng jouse, ka-Pathen u insahna dinga lengpa le lengpa thumop’a pang, amilen amilalte jousen atou, hiche thilto chengse chu keiman katetoh soh keiyin kapedoh tai;

hichea katedoh a akhut’uva kapehdoh thilto jat chu dangka talent jagup le som nga alhingin, dangka a kisem khan le lheng ho jong chu talent ja khat man ahin, chutengleh sana jong talent ja khatma alhinge;
sanaa kisem khon som ni ahin, hiche ho chu daric sang khat man ahi, chule sum-eng bangleh a kisem bel ni jong ahin, hiche teni hi sana lut’a lu ahilhone.

Keiman thempuho jah a chun kaseipeh-in, “Nang ho hi Pakai dinga atheng nahiuvin, chule bel teni jong hi atheng ahitai; chutengleh dangka le sana jong hi Pakai napu napateu Pathen dinga deichoma kitoh doh ahitai.

Thil hijat hi chingtup jinguvin lang, Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin dan sung dunga thempu pipupa leh Levite chule pu le pa lhah a insung phung upa chengse angsunga natedoh peh masang seuvin koiphauvin,” kati.
Hijeh chun thempuho leh Leviten tedohsa dangka le sana chule bel teni chu alauvin, Jerusalem khopia ka-Pathen u houina lhut din apotauve.

Chujouvin lha masapen, nikho som le ni lhin nin Jerusalem khopi lama che din Aha’va vadunga konin kakipatdoh tauve; kachunguva ka-Pathen uvin akhut ajap jing jengin, melmate khut’a kon leh lampi dunga min einachan lhih nau jousea eihuhdoh peh uvin ahi.
Chuin Jerusalem khopi kahung lhunguvin, akhopia chun nithum sungin kanichong tauve.

Ni li lhin nin ka-Pathenu houin sunga dangka le sana, chule bel teni chu akitedoh-in Uri’ah chapa thempupa Mer’emoth le aumpi ho khut’a akipedoh tai, ama toh umkhom miho chu Phin’ehas chapa Elea’zar jong ahin, amahi hitoh Levite jong, Jeshua chapa Jo’zabad jong ahiuvin, Bin’nui chapa No-adi’ah jong ahi.
Thilkeo jouse chu abonchanin atetoh soh keiyuvin, akisimtoh-in, thil ijakai chu agihjat akisun lut soh keiyin ahi.

Hichepet hin kihenna muna kona sohchang hung kile kit mihon Israel Pathen henga pumgo thilto anatoh uvin, bongchal som le ni Israel pumpi din atoh uvin, kelngoichal somko le gup ahin, kelngoi som sagi le sagi ahin, chutengleh chonset thiltoa pang din kelchal som le ni jong ahin, thilto hijatpi hi Pakaiya pumgo thiltoa kitoh doh ahi.

Chutengleh lengpa thu thot jouse jong chu vadung gal lama gamvaipo thuneiya pang ho henga alhut’uvin ahi: hiche gamvaipo thuneiya pang ho jong chun Israel mipi leh Pathen houin sahna chunga kithopina apeuvin ahi.

Thilbol natoh hijal pi hi akichaisoh phat’in vaibola pang ho chu kahenga ahunguvin kajah a thu aseiyun hitin atiuve, “Israel mite leh thempuho, Leviho hi agamsung mite, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Per’iz mite, Jeb’us mite, Ammon mite, Mo’ab mite, Egypt mite chule Amor mite thilbol achon nau thet umtah tah thil hoa konin akikhindoh deh pouvin, atumin aumdoh pouve.

Ijeh-inem itileh amahon agam mite chanu phabep jong jin akipuiyun, achapateu din jong jin apuipeh tauve; hitobang hin hiche namtheng tah mite hi acham chamin agamsung mite toh akichoh halsoh uvin akihal gamtauve. Chule hitobang kitahna bei thilbolna chung chang thudol ahin vaibola pang ho leh milah a lamkai ho akhut sao penin apanguvin ahi,” ahung tiuve.
Hiche aseiyu kajah doh phat’in keiman kaponsil jouse leh kavon jouse kabot tel jengin, kalujanga konin kajangsam kabotdoh-in, kakhamul geiyin kabotdoh jengin katou thip jenge.

Hiche sohchang hung kile kit ho kitah loujeh a Israel Pathen thusei jouse kichaa kitihot hot miho chu keima thip beh a katouna kimvela chun ahung kikhom khom jenguvin, keijong nilhah kilhaina gantha phat geiyin katouvin ahi.

Chuin nilhah kilhaina gantha phat alhin phat’in keijong an ngola katouna a konin kahung kipatdoh paiyin, kaponsil le kavon jouse teldeh duh pumin kakhup te nin tola kaboh khup’in kalumin, kakhut te nin Pakai ka-Pathen lam kasangin.
kaseitai; “Vo ka-Pathen, nangma heng lam hinvet ding kajah acha behseh jengin kamai asan leu jeng tai; ka-Pathen kachonset nau kaluvum sanguvin jong asangjo tan, kathepmo nau van a akitungdoh tai.

Kapu kapateu khang laiya pat tuni geiyin thepmona lentah kanei jing jenguve; chujongleh keiho themmo jeh a keiho jong kalengteu jong, kathempu’uva pang ho jong, gamsung mite leng ho khut’a eikipedohsau ahitan, chemjamto ikitouva, soh a ikihen’uva, min eichom gamsit set jenguva, tulaiya kaum chan bang banguva jum le ja thoh a eikilhau ahitai.

Hijeng jongleh tun phat chom cha kah hin Pakai ka-Pathen uvin keiho eilungset kit’uvin mihem athimoh ahingdoh them khattou khendoh a, ama muntheng phunga hi keiho mundet khat beh peh a, chutengleh ka-Pathenu chun kamit’u ahasal sah dom’a kasohchan kakihen nauva kona kisuh lipna them khat beh peh ding eigot’u ahi.

Ajeh chu keiho hi akihen sohchang kahibouvui; hijongleh hiche kihen’a kaum nauva hin ka-Pathen’uvin eidalha deh pouve, Persia lengte angsunga keiho hi alungset longlou chun eihol jinguvin, kakitildoh uva ka-Pathenu houin kasahdoh kit’uva, asekom jouse kasemphat’uva, Juda gam le Jerusalem khopia chensah a hontup din eigouve.
“Hijeh chun tua hitobang thilsoh nunga hi keihon ipipen kasei diu hitam, O ka-Pathenu? Ajeh chu nangma thupeh jouse kapal keh gam’uvin kasumilsoh tauve,

hiche thupeh ho hi nangman nalhacha themgaoho kama naseiya hitia nati ahi, “Nang ho acheng dinga nacheuva nalut nau gamsung khu agam miten asuhboh a athenglou gam ahin, thet umtah tah thil jeng abol’uva hitobang then louna thil hoa chu agamsung hi among lang khat’a pat alang mong geiya asuhboh soh hel’u ahitai.

Hijeh chun tun nang hon amaho khu achapateu ji din nachanuteu peh dauvin lang, nachapateu ji din jong achanuteu khu puipeh dauvin, amaho khutoh itih chanin jong kicham ding ngaito dauvin lang akhantouna diu jong gel hih hel’uvin, chutileh nangho hatjouvun natin, agamsunga anpha naneh thei diu, chule nachate natute dia lo ding gou phatah gamsung hi nadalhah peh thei diu ahi,’ tia naseisa anahi.

Thilse kabol jeh-u leh kathemmo nau lentah jeh a thil hijatpi hi kachunguva ahung lhun nung hin, ka-Pathenu nangman keiho hi kachonset nau sanga neojo talen neipeh uva, hitobang tah a hi thigam dinga kilom keiho hi ahingdoh amoh jeng jong neikoi nah-u ahi, ti kamudoh tauve;

tugei geiya jong nangma thupeh jouse kasuh keh kit’uva, hitobang thil thet umtah tah bol mite hitoh kakijonto nah lai diu ham? Nei bahgam kahseuva nangma kachunguva nalung han a chule ahingdoh jong amoh jong, ajamdoh jong beihel’a neilha jeng diu hilou ham?

O Pakai, Israel Pathen, nangma hi dihtah nahi, ajeh chu tulaiya nabol bang hin nangin keiho lah a mi phabep ahingdoh a amoh ajamdoh a neikoipeh nalaiyui. Vetan, kathemmo nau pumin nang angsunga kahung lut’uve, hiche themmona jeh a hi keiho koi macha jong na-angsunga hung ding ngamlou kahiu ahitai,” ati.

Ezra in chonset aphondoh a taona aneiya, kap ham let lut’a Pathen houin maiya tola akijam pet tah chun Israelte lah a konin pasal numei, chapang geiyin Ezra henga Houbung lhingset’in ahung kikhom’uvin ahi; ajeh chu mipi jeng jong lhase tah a kap soh keiyah ahiuve.

Hichun Elam chate lah kona Jehi’el chapa Shecani’ah kitipa chun Ezra chu ahin houvin, “Keihon i-Pathenu chunga katahsanu kasukeh uvin hotobangpi hin jatdang mite, agamsunga cheng mite numei ho hi jin kanei gamtauve, hijongleh hitobang thil hi kibol jeng tajongleh Israelte din kinepna aum nalaiye.

Hijeh chun kapu le Pakai thupeh ginna kitihot hot’a um miho dei bangin tun jong hiche numei jouse hi dadohna ding leh achateu kaidoh soh keina dingin i-Pathenu toh kitepna khat semdoh jengu hite; chule hiche ibol diu hi danthua kisei dungjui in bol’u hite.
Hung kipatdoh loiyin hiche hi nangma kin ahi, keihon jong nangma kapan pinauve; hang tah-in pangin lang tong jengin,” ati.

Chutah chun Ezra jong akipatdoh pai jengin, thempuho le Levite lamkaiho, chule Israel pumpi chu akisei bang banga chu abolna diuvin akihahsel sah soh tai. Hijeh chun amaho jong akihahsel soh keiyuvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Ezra jong chu Pathen houin maiya alupnaa konin athouvin, Eli’ashib chapa Jeho-ha’nan kitipa indan sunga alut’in, hikoma chun ageh khovahin, an jong nelou twi jong don louvin aumtai; ijeh-inem itileh sohchang hung kile kit ho kitah loujeh a lunghem behseh jeng ahitai.
Chuin Judah gam pumpi leh Jerusalem khopi sung thongsoh hel’in thu khat akiphongin, sohchang hung kile kit miho chu Jerusalem khopia hung kikhomsoh kei din akikoutai.

Ijemtia nithum sunga mihem khattou ahung lhalou aum khah a ahileh, hitobang mi chu vaibol ho le upaho phatsah dungjuiya amaho thupeh a kona anei athilkeo jouse kisubeiya, ama jeng jong sohchang hung kile kit ho lah a kilutsah louhel ding ahi, tin akiphongtai.

Hijeh chun nithum sungin Judah gam mite leh Benjamin phunga mite chu Jerusalem khopia ahung kikhom kimdep tauve; ahung kikhop nau chu lha ko lhinna, chuche lha, nisom ni lhin ni ahi. Athudan akhoh jeh leh go hajuh a ajuh jeh-in Pathen houin mai tollhanga tou mipi chu akihot hot jenguvin ahi.
Hichun Ezra thempupa jong adingdoh-in ajah uva aseitai, “Nang hon jatdang numei jin naneiyun nachon khelsoh tauve, chujeh hin Israelte themmona jong napunbe sah tauvin ahi.
Hijeh chun tun Pakai napu napateu Pathen henga chonset phonguvin lang ama lungdei dei bol jenguvin; agamsung mitea kon leh jatdang numei nachenpiuva kon hin hung kitum sedoh jengun,” ati.
Chutah chun Houbung pumpin ogin thongje jun adonbut soh keiyuvin, “Chuti ahinai; nangma sei bang bangin bol nau vinge.

Ahivangin mipi hi tamtah kahiuvin, go hajuh laima ahin, keiho tollhanga ding jou pouvinge. Hiche kihahselna thilbol ding jong hi ni khat ni ni sunga toh chai thei ahipoi; ajeh chu hiche chung chang thudol a hi keiho melse tah a chon khelsoh kahiu ahitai.

Houbung pumpi thalhengin vaibola pang ho dingu hen, chutengleh jatdang mi numei jia kipui khopi chengse chu aphat kitep donin hungu hen; amaho chutoh akhopi jousea konin kho upa chengse leh thutan vaihom jouse jong hung soh keiyu hen, hiche chung chang thudola i-Pathenu lungsatna hi ichunguva kona akitol mang kahsen hiti chun bol jengu hite,” atiuvin ahi.
Ahinla hiche aseiyu hi As’ahel chapa Jonathan le Tikvah chapa Jahzei’ah chun anel lhonin, Meshul’lam le Levi mi Shab’bethai chun ajop lhonin ahi.

Sohchang hung kile kit hon hitobang chun aboltauve. Ezra thempupan mi alhengdoh-in, apu apau lhah a insung kailhah a phung upa chengse chu amin cheh-in alhengin, lha som lhin na, nikho masapen nin hiche thudol ngaito khoma kholtoh din amaho chu atoukhom tauvin ahi.
Lha masapen nikho masa nin jatdang numei jia neiya mijat asimu chu asimchai bep seuvun ahi.

Thempuho chate lah a jatdang numei jia neiya akimudoh mijat chu Maasei’ah ahin, Elie’zer ahin, Jarib ahin, chule Gedali’ah ahiuve; amaho hi Jo’zadak le asopite chate lah a Jo’zadak chapa Jeshua chapa jeng ahiuve.
Mi hijat hin ajite chengseu da din kitepna kigahna abol’uvin, chule athemmo nau thiltoa man dingin kelngoi hon lah a kona kimandoh kelngoichal khat atoh doh uvin ahi.
Immer chate lah a Hana’ni le Zebadi’ah ahilhone.
Harim chate lah a Ma-asei’ah le Eli’jah toh, Shemai’ah leh Jehi’el, chule Uzzi’ah ahiuve.
Pashhur chate lah a Eli-o-e’nai, Maasei’ah, Ish’mael, Nethan’el, Jo’zabad chule Ela’sah ahiuvin ahi.
Levite lah a kimatdoh chu Jo’zabad, Shi’me-i, Kelai’ah, ama hr Keli’ta jong kiti ahi, Petha-hi’ah, Judah, chule Eli’ezer toh ahiuve.
Lathem ho lah a Eli’ashib akimandoh-in, kelkot ngah ho lah a Shallum le Telem toh, chule Uri akimandoh-uve.
Israel sunga kimandoh chu, Parosh chate lah a Rami’ah, Izzi’ah, Malchi’jah, Mi’jamin, Elea’zar, Hashabi’ah chule Bena’iah ahiuve.
Elam chate lah a Mattani’ah, Zechari’ah, Jehi’el, Abdi, Jer’emoth chule Eli’jah mi hijat hi akimandoh uvin ahi.
Zattu chate lah a konin jong Eli-o-e’nai le Eli’ashib toh, Mattani’ah toh, Jer’emoth toh, Zabad le Azi’za akimandoh uvin ahi.
Be’bai chate lah a kimandoh ho chu Jeho-ha’nan le Hanani’ah toh, Zab’bai le Ath’lai ahiuve.
Bani chate lah a akimandoh chu Meshul’lam le Malluch toh, Adai’ah, Jashub, She’al chule Jer’emoth ahiuvin ahi.
Pa’hath-mo’ab chate lah a kimandoh chu Adna, Chelal, Bena’iah, Maasei’ah, Mattani’ah, Bez’alel, Bin’nui, chule Manas’seh ahiuve.
Harim chate lah a kimandoh chu Elie’zer, Isshi’jah, Malchi’jah, Shemai’ah, Shim’e-on,
Benjamin, Malluch, chule Shemari’ah ahiuve.
Hashum chate lah a kimandoh a chu Matte’nai, Mat’tattah, Zabad, Eliph’elet, Jer’emai, Manas’seh, chule Shim’e-i ahiuve.
Bani chate lah a Ma-ada’i, Amram, Uel,
Bena’iah, Bedei’ah, Chel’uhi,
Vani’ah, Mer’emoth, Eli’ashib
Mattani’ah, Matte’nai, Ja’asu hijat hi akimandoh uvin ahi.
Bin’nui chate lah a kimandoh chu Shim’e-i,
Shelemi’ah, Nathan, Adai’ah,
Machnad’ebai, Shashai, Sha’rai,
Az’arel, Shelemi’ah, Shemari’ah,
Shallum, Amari’ah, chule Joseph ahiuve.
Nebo chate lah a kimandoh chu Je-i’el, Mattithi’ah, Zabad, Zebi’na, Jaddai, Jo’el, chule Bena’iah ahiuve.
Mi hijat hin jatdang numei akichenpiuvin, ajiteu chu achate pumin adasoh hel’uve.
